decks.notes: The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through counterspells, removal spells, and hand disruption while generating card advantage and value through cards like Brainstorm, Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, and Lórien Revealed. It also utilizes powerful threats like Murktide Regent and Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath to close out the game. Additionally, it includes mana denial with cards like Wasteland and Assassin's Trophy to further control the board state. The deck aims to control the game and outvalue the opponent in order to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on assembling the Painter's Servant and Grindstone combo to mill the opponent's library. It also utilizes cards like Goblin Welder and Goblin Engineer to tutor and recur combo pieces, while providing disruption with cards like Pyroblast and Spellskite. The deck aims to control the game and set up the combo quickly, using mana acceleration from Moxen and Ancient Tomb. Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and Urza's Saga provide additional value and threats. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan to secure a win.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using Eldrazi Temples and Ancient Tombs to play powerful Eldrazi creatures like Reality Smasher and Thought-Knot Seer. The deck also utilizes Chalice of the Void to disrupt opponent's spells and Wasteland to control their lands. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive Eldrazi creatures while utilizing various synergies and disruption spells to maintain board control and pressure.

The deck focuses on quickly and efficiently putting powerful creatures into play through the combo of Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By using cards like Brainstorm, Ponder, and Stock Up to dig for combo pieces and protect them with counterspells like Force of Will and Flusterstorm, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with massive creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Archon of Cruelty. With the ability to cheat creatures into play without paying their mana costs, the deck aims to win the game quickly and decisively.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy powerful artifacts such as Chalice of the Void, Mox Opal, and Urza's Saga to disrupt the opponent and generate card advantage. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Krang, Master Mind provide additional value by recurring artifacts from the graveyard. Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary serve as aggressive threats to end the game quickly. The deck aims to control the board with disruptive artifacts while applying pressure through its aggressive artifact creatures, ultimately overwhelming the opponent with a powerful artifact-based strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize low-cost spells and creatures to apply pressure on the opponent quickly while disrupting their game plan with counterspells and removal. The deck focuses on quickly deploying threats like Delver of Secrets, Monastery Swiftspear, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and Murktide Regent to chip away at the opponent's life total. It also includes efficient spells like Brainstorm, Lightning Bolt, and Daze to control the board and protect its own creatures. With a mix of aggression and disruption, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver its opponents in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on quickly generating mana and playing powerful artifacts to overwhelm the opponent. It includes cards that help to ramp up mana production such as Grim Monolith and Ancient Tomb, as well as disruptive cards like Wasteland and Pithing Needle to control the game. Glaring Fleshraker and Patchwork Automaton provide aggressive threats, while Mystic Forge and Urza's Saga offer card advantage and additional utility. The deck aims to establish a dominant board presence early on and maintain pressure throughout the game.

This combo deck aims to cheat powerful creatures such as Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Griselbrand into play quickly using Show and Tell or Sneak Attack. With cards like Omniscience and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, the deck can overwhelm opponents with massive threats and win the game in just a few turns. The deck also includes plenty of card draw and counterspells to protect its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The key idea is to ramp up quickly and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures before they can react effectively.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through counter spells, removal, card draw, and powerful threats like Murktide Regent. By utilizing a combination of Force of Will, Swords to Plowshares, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, it aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining card advantage. Leyline Binding and Quantum Riddler help to further control the board and slow down the opponent's actions. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by efficiently answering threats and deploying its own powerful creatures to secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing Cloudpost to quickly ramp up mana and cast powerful Eldrazi creatures. It includes tools like Crop Rotation to search for key lands, along with cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Planar Nexus to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also utilizes artifact synergies with cards like Karn's Sylex and Kozilek's Command to further control the board. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats and mana advantage to secure a victory.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells like Force of Will and Daze, while also utilizing removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out to control the board. The creatures like Murktide Regent and Nethergoyf provide a clock for the opponent to deal with, while Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student digs for more threats and disruptive spells. The deck also includes cards like Thoughtseize to strip key cards from the opponent's hand and Wasteland to disrupt their mana base. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's strategy.

The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing cards that can pump up creatures like Glistener Elf and Blighted Agent with spells like Invigorate and Embiggen to quickly deal lethal poison damage to the opponent. Additionally, cards like Berserk can be used as a finisher to take the opponent by surprise and secure victory. The deck also includes a mix of counter spells like Force of Will and disruptive cards like Daze to protect the combo pieces and ensure a smooth gameplay experience towards achieving lethal poison damage.

This deck focuses on utilizing efficient creatures and spells to pressure opponents and disrupt their game plan. UR Tempo leans heavily on cards like Delver of Secrets, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and Murktide Regent to apply pressure while using countermagic like Daze and Force of Will to protect its threats. The deck also includes card draw spells like Brainstorm and Ponder to ensure a smooth draw and maintain tempo. Wasteland is used to disrupt opponent's mana base, while Lightning Bolt provides additional reach and removal. The deck aims to control the board and close out games quickly through aggressive creature attacks.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing lands to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The key strategy is to assemble the Dark Depths/Thespian's Stage combo to create a 20/20 Marit Lage token, while using cards like Wasteland, Ghost Quarter, and Sphere of Resistance to slow down the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Life from the Loam and Exploration to ensure consistent land drops and Boseiju, Who Endures to protect key spells from counterspells. Overall, the main goal is to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent through land interactions and control elements.
